name: MSI B850 GAMING PLUS WIFI PZ ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x4 - Support DDR5-8200(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 10Gbps Type-C+A - DisplayPort 1.2 - Realtek 5Gb LAN - 802.11be 2x2 Wi-Fi 7 - Bluetooth 5.4 (PROB850GPWPZ)
shortName: MSI B850 GAMING PLUS WIFI PZ ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe
description: Mid-range AM5 ATX gaming motherboard with PCIe 5.0, Wi-Fi 7, and high-speed USB for gaming enthusiasts.
